title: Retrieval v2 default-promotion decision
goal: Run a current, reproducible default-promotion decision for Retrieval v2-style surfaces using real dumps and the existing promotion gate; keep default false unless measured non-regression and improvement thresholds are met.

acceptance.assertion: A current evaluation run records dataset/dump, metrics and artifact hashes.
The default-promotion decision is explicit: promote, keep false, or defer with blocker.
Category regressions, misses, fallback counts and range/citation health are reported.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #926: a current Retrieval v2 default-promotion decision was recorded against the 20260708T152502Z real RepoBrief dump. The diagnostic gate passed with review-intent recall@10 95.0 vs legacy 10.0, MRR 0.3751190476190477 vs 0.1, expected-target hits 27/60 vs 2/60, no category regressions, zero candidate fallbacks, fresh graph health and passing range/citation health. The explicit decision is keep false: the diagnostic gate remains non-promotional and no default behavior change is authorized.
validation: Lenskit PR #926 GitHub CI passed: CodeQL, pytest-full, ruff, planning-registration, doc-freshness, graph-model, graph-bundle-sources, repo-root, templates, webui-js-tests, contract guards and reusable fixture validation.

Local before merge: JSON reports parsed, planning-registration ratchet had zero new findings, gate core reproduced from committed reports, 104 retrieval/goldset/eval tests passed, targeted ruff passed and diff-check passed.

Post-merge on origin/main 79bdfa197c0fe47cf52d121ce0583df96e858e68: JSON parsed, planning-registration ratchet had zero new findings, diff-check passed, 104 focused tests passed and targeted ruff passed.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t011-current-run: Current run 20260708T152502Z records repo commit, dump stem, input artifact hashes, produced report hashes, metrics and health reports.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t011-decision: The explicit decision is keep false: promote_default=false and default_promotion_allowed=false even though the diagnostic gate status is passed.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t011-regressions: Category matrix reports no regressions; misses decrease 58 to 33; fallback count is zero; graph health is fresh/ok; range/citation health is pass.
